title: Wastify
description: Alter biomes and/or blocks after worldgen
body:
# Wastify

With this mod you can alter worldgen. It allows you to replace biomes or blocks. Replacing blocks is expensive so be careful with that! In the configuration you can define a mapping between biomes and a mapping between blocks. The main purpose of this mod was to allow you to make a world look like a wasteland but it can also be used to get rid of biomes that you don't want. Or get rid of blocks you don't want in the world (like water).

## Usage
### 1.16.5
To use this mod you first have to edit its configuration. By default this mod doesn't do anything. This mod is intended to be used with the default world type.

### 1.18.2 and 1.19.2
In this version there is a preconfigured `overworld.json` which will convert your landscape to desert. To override this you need to make a datapack with your custom `overworld.json`. More documentation will follow later

## Screenshot
Here is an example of a world converted to a wasteland by this mod:

![A Wasteland!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6GSnLKaR/images/36ba5e5150e3618cfcae69cc4fdd08409f23fc48.png)

## Modpacks
This mod is free to be used in any modpack. Let me know if you have issues. And warning! The block replacement feature really makes worldgen a lot slower. Use at your own risk!
